channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mavs star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL and is out for the season, AP source says
item.description: A person with knowledge of the injury says Dallas Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL in his left knee and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Schuyler Dixon, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Goalie of the future? Spencer Knight makes 41 saves, backstops Blackhawks to win over Kings in debut with team
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN, AP) — Spencer Knight was once considered the goaltender of the future for one NHL franchise. Now he plans to make a case as the goaltender of the future for another, and he got right to work with the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Payton McNabb, HS volleyball player severely injured by trans opponent, to be at Trump's speech to Congress
item.description: Payton McNabb, a former high school volleyball player who was left permanently injured after a spike from a trans athlete, will be in the audience for President Donald Trump's joint speech to Congress.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brewers boost rotation depth by adding veteran lefty Jose Quintana, AP source says
item.description: Veteran left-handed pitcher Jose Quintana is joining the Milwaukee Brewers on a one-year, $4.25 million deal with $1 million in potential bonuses, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement hasn't been announced.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 USC hopes to build off first conference title in 31 years in Big Ten tournament
item.description: With their first regular season conference championship in 31 years in hand, Southern California will turn its attention to the Big Ten tournament. The second-ranked Trojans know winning that championship will be difficult.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg stars once more in his possible farewell at Cameron Indoor Stadium
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke was minutes away from completing a perfect record on its famed home court with a Senior Night rout of Wake Forest. That's when the buzzer sounded for freshman phenom Cooper Flagg, who checked out — possibly for the final time at Cameron Indoor Stadium.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander making 50-point games a regular occurrence for the West-leading Thunder
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's putback basket in the fourth quarter put him over 50 points and sent the Oklahoma City crowd into a frenzy. The Thunder star responded by jogging downcourt expressionless, as if it were no big deal. That’s because it has become almost routine for him.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mavs' Kyrie Irving suffers left knee sprain, shoots free throws before leaving game
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Kyrie Irving suffered a left knee sprain Monday night and shot free throws for the Mavericks — with tears rolling down his cheeks — before leaving the floor in obvious pain late in the first quarter of Dallas' 122-98 loss to the Sacramento Kings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 51 as Thunder top Rockets 137-128 for 50th win
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 51 points and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Houston Rockets 137-128 on Monday night for their 50th win of the season. Gilgeous-Alexander reached 50 points for the fourth time this season, all in the past seven weeks.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate Dems face backlash after bill to prevent boys from playing girls' sports fails to break filibuster
item.description: Riley Gaines, Jennifer Sey and others torch Senate Democrats after the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act fails to break the filibuster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being a face of its NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON and JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CIF NorCal Open champ Archbishop Mitty hires former Marin Catholic volleyball coach Jake Spain to run program
item.description: Archbishop Mitty's new volleyball coach, Jake Spain, has extensive experience at the high school and club level in the North Bay. He'll have a tall task ahead replacing outgoing coach Jon Wallace.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Tiger Woods cheers, shares heartwarming hug with daughter Sam after she wins Florida state soccer title
item.description: Tiger Woods was the one in the gallery cheering on Saturday, as his daughter Sam played a major role in The Benjamin School winning the girls varsity soccer state title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees' AL Rookie of the Year Luis Gil to start season on injured list with shoulder injury
item.description: Yankees right-hander Luis Gil will start the season on the injured list because of a high-grade lat strain in his pitching shoulder that will prevent him from throwing for at least six weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LA Kings apologize for selling scarves made in Turkey on Armenian Night
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Kings have apologized for selling scarves made in Turkey during Armenian Heritage Night last month.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge denies Alberto Osuna's bid for injunction as he attempts to play baseball for Tennessee
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Alberto Osuna’s bid to play baseball for defending College World Series champion Tennessee received a setback Monday when a federal judge denied his bid for a preliminary injunction.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bengals place franchise tag on receiver Tee Higgins for 2nd time
item.description: CINCINNATI (AP) — The Cincinnati Bengals have placed the franchise tag on Tee Higgins for a second time, as the team hopes to work out a long-term deal with the star wide receiver.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ACC, FSU, Clemson reach proposed settlement to end legal fight, change money distribution: AP source
item.description: The legal fights between the Atlantic Coast Conference and high-profile member schools Clemson and Florida State appear close to resolution, which could provide the league with a measure of stability for the coming years.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Foul! Cavaliers guard Ty Jerome blasts officials after whistle-happy crew calls 53 fouls
item.description: Upset with an inordinate number of personals called during Cleveland's 133-129 overtime win against Portland on Sunday, Jerome didn't hold back in criticizing the officiating crew — zeroing in on referee Natalie Sago.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Naomi Girma is injured on her Chelsea debut after world record transfer
item.description: Naomi Girma, women’s soccer's first million-dollar player, was injured and substituted on her Chelsea debut on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Commanders acquire wide receiver Deebo Samuel in a trade with the 49ers, AP source says
item.description: The Washington Commanders have acquired wide receiver Deebo Samuel from the San Francisco 49ers for a fifth-round pick, pending a physical, according to a person with knowledge of the trade.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, Fox 5

item.title: Angelo Posada, The Titan of the Titans
item.description: "Those who stay will be champions" - that's the motto of Poway Wrestling; one they adopted from Michigan Football under that was adopted under legendary head Coach Bo Schembechler. That motto rings true for the five-time state champion Titans, who have won 44 CIF SDS titles in the last 47 years.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Gavin Lowe scores 35 as Olympus rolls to 5A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The first two times Olympus and Highland met this season, both games were decided by a total of four points. But in Friday's 5A championship, it wasn't close at all.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KRON4
